title: Project Manager (Application, Infrastructure)
description:
Project Manager (Application, Infrastructure)
1 year contract, potential to renew

Come and join us!
Do you wish to work in a world-class organization trying your hands at something you have dreamt of doing?

“FIND YOUR PLACE” by joining a world-class MNC Healthcare company
Get an opportunity to explore new technology, learn new skills, enjoy the diverse and open culture, engagement and care, flexible working model, career opportunities, competitive salary and bonus, and endless amenities and benefits.

Company Description:
Our client is an MNC Healthcare company. As a focused healthcare company, with expertise in Innovative Medicine and MedTech, they are empowered to tackle the world’s toughest health challenges, innovate through science and technology, and transform patient care.

Position Summary
The Project Manager serves as the primary point of accountability to designated sector and business partners. This individual is responsible for managing and overseeing application demand, setting standards for the engagement model, and ensuring consistency, adherence, and the measurement of success. The role is integral in governing the Technology Solutions Engagement model both in theory and in practice, and in driving successful partnerships that unlock business value.

Key Responsibilities

  • Act as the single point of accountability to sector business and business technology partners, representing Technology Services at all organizational levels.
  • Manage demand for Technology Services Application capabilities across a wide range, including application development, application maintenance, networking, infrastructure, end user services, information security and risk management (ISRM), privacy, and compliance.
  • Work collaboratively with peer Technology Solutions Engagement Strategists and Directors to drive operational metrics, governance, and strategy for Technology Services engagement and partner with Business Technology teams.
  • Lead and empower teams to deliver results through collaboration in cross-functional, self-organized structures, fostering clarity of purpose and vision, and pushing decision-making to the lowest appropriate level.
  • Ensure Technology Services work products meet stated business needs and achieve desired outcomes, owning intake, roadmap, and quality across sector value streams.
  • Communicate the need for change and serve as a point of escalation throughout all stages of the solution lifecycle to optimize value.

Key Skills & Qualifications

  • Degree in any Technology Field with minimum 7 years of Project Management experience in application and infrastructure
  • Demonstrated leadership skills, with experience leading teams and creating an environment that fosters empowered, accountable, and collaborative results.
  • Strong knowledge of Technology Services capabilities, including application development, application maintenance, networking, infrastructure, end user services, ISRM, privacy, and compliance.
  • Foundational expertise in Data Engineering, Cybersecurity, Intelligent Automation, and Scientific and Digital Health Technologies.
  • Experience applying human-centered design principles to deliver fully aligned, context-driven solutions.
  • Excellent partnership skills, with success driving alignment and collaboration across functional and sector boundaries.
  • Agility in leading through change and influencing decisions within dynamic business environments.

Interested parties, please apply through this link https://jnj-apac.talent-pool.com/projects OR click on APPLY button. Alternatively, you can share your CV at joleyn.chin@randstadsourceright.com.sg

Reg No: R1440247

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
